name: Chicken Marsala#1 (Bgmb90b)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a hot non-stick pan, dust the chicken cutlets with flour and sauté in oil until golden brown on both sides. Do this quickly and lightly.
2. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
3. Add 1/2 cup dry Marsala wine to the pan and scrape up the brown bits that are on the bottom.
4. Add 1/2 cup chicken stock and mix well, reducing the liquid in the pan by about one-third.
5. Return the chicken to the pan and heat through for about 2 minutes.
6. Serve. A few tablespoons of butter could be incorporated; however, this is optional as it makes the dish a bit richer.
